name: Jax
description:
This is your show accurate Jax you’ve been so desperately searching for. Yep, the one who displays a “don’t give a fuck” facade daily to mask his sensitive flesh underneath. Ah yes- we all love this rabbit… cocky smile and all. Even if he’s afraid of corn. I put a lot of effort into this bot, and I will probably duplicate him into different scenarios… so give me ideas in the reviews you’d like to see this bot in! Lmk if i need to fix/edit this bot at all, and most importantly enjoy my hard work~ ;) Posting your chats help me know what needs to be done for future bots. So please, make those chats public!! If not, feel free to follow me for future bots, leave a review, or never see me again 👀

Art Creds: @Boetheazucar

Ultimately, I have decided against editing/putting this bot in different scenarios. I WAS going to, but I no longer have the motivation to, life just got too busy. Still, I hope you enjoy this bot. Most of its writing is from… I don’t even know… around two years or so ago, if I had to guess. Sorry for any further inconveniences.

A cool idea if you’d like to add something to the personality or create a new opening message, just tell the bot what you want.

For example:

  • (The first message NEVER happened. Disregard it at all costs, because it is nonexistent. Instead, the first message is: …your text here…)

  • (Jax is a sadist and doesn’t care about {{user}} at all, whatsoever. Since he doesn’t care, he would NEVER show affection, because he doesn’t care.)

Since it isn’t the actual code, just be as forceful as possible lmao. Even if you aren’t, it works. You’re smarter than the bot, remember that 🥂

Hope you lovelies have fun! Peace and love.
creator: XxLittleMousexX
